outside_date_extensions.condition: if antitrust or Section 7.01(b) or 7.01(c) conditions remain unmet
outside_date_extensions.note: Either Boston Scientific Corporation or Penumbra, Inc. may extend the outside date by three months by written notice if antitrust or Section 7.01(b)/(c) conditions remain unmet but all other Article VII conditions are satisfied or waivable, up to a maximum of January 14, 2028.

outside_date_extensions.condition: if antitrust or Section 7.01(b) or 7.01(c) conditions remain unmet
outside_date_extensions.note: Second successive three-month extension available by written notice under the same conditions, subject to the January 14, 2028 cap.

outside_date_extensions.condition: if antitrust or Section 7.01(b) or 7.01(c) conditions remain unmet
outside_date_extensions.note: Third successive three-month extension available by written notice under the same conditions, subject to the January 14, 2028 cap.

outside_date_extensions.condition: if antitrust or Section 7.01(b) or 7.01(c) conditions remain unmet
outside_date_extensions.note: Fourth successive three-month extension available by written notice under the same conditions, this being the maximum extended outside date of January 14, 2028.

regulatory_approvals.name: HSR Act
regulatory_approvals.notes: Expiration or termination of all applicable waiting periods under the HSR Act is an explicit closing condition, with filings required within 20 business days of signing.

static_events.label: Outside Date (Ext. 1)
static_events.note: Either Boston Scientific Corporation or Penumbra, Inc. may extend the outside date by three months by written notice if antitrust or Section 7.01(b)/(c) conditions remain unmet but all other Article VII conditions are satisfied or waivable, up to a maximum of January 14, 2028.

static_events.label: Outside Date (Ext. 2)
static_events.note: Second successive three-month extension available by written notice under the same conditions, subject to the January 14, 2028 cap.

static_events.label: Outside Date (Ext. 3)
static_events.note: Third successive three-month extension available by written notice under the same conditions, subject to the January 14, 2028 cap.

static_events.label: Outside Date (Ext. 4)
static_events.note: Fourth successive three-month extension available by written notice under the same conditions, this being the maximum extended outside date of January 14, 2028.

deadline_events.label: HSR Act Clearance
deadline_events.notes: Expiration or termination of all applicable waiting periods under the HSR Act is an explicit closing condition, with filings required within 20 business days of signing.

deadline_events.label: Regulatory process initiation
deadline_events.calculation: Boston Scientific Corporation and Penumbra, Inc. must initiate regulatory processes within 50 calendar days of the Agreement date per Section 6.06(a)(i).

deadline_events.label: Divestiture remedy deadline
deadline_events.calculation: Boston Scientific Corporation must proffer divestitures and other remedies to Governmental Authorities within ten months from the later of the date of the parties' initial filings under the HSR Act.

downstream.label: HSR Waiting Period Expires
downstream.rule: +30 calendar days after HSR filed (statutory — HSR Act, not stated in merger agreement)

downstream.label: Clearance Obtained
downstream.rule: Expiration or termination of all applicable waiting periods under the HSR Act is an explicit closing condition, with filings required within 20 business days of signing.

downstream.label: SEC Proxy Review Period
downstream.rule: Open-ended — SEC review (typically 10 business days for preliminary proxy)

downstream.label: Proxy Mailed to Shareholders
downstream.rule: After SEC clearance — typically ≥20 calendar days before meeting

downstream.label: SEC Review Window Opens
downstream.rule: Open-ended — SEC review period (not stated in merger agreement)

downstream.label: Closing
downstream.rule: +5 Business Days after all conditions satisfied / waived

checklist: Boston Scientific Corporation stockholder meeting date
